evals.name: full-auto-saas
evals.prompt: Napravi mi SaaS za tracking vremena za freelancere. Treba da ima dashboard gde vidim projekte i koliko sati sam radio na svakom, timer koji startuje/stopira, nedeljni izveštaj koji se auto-generiše, i invoice generator koji računa na osnovu hourly rate. Tech stack: Next.js + Prisma + SQLite. Treba i landing page i 3 LinkedIn posta za launch. Target su freelance developeri u regionu. /hp-auto
evals.expected_output: Pipeline runs full auto: generates PLAN.md with Visual Design Language section, SPRINT-CONTRACT.md with 20+ testable behaviors, brand.md with archetype and 10 colors, builds working Next.js app with timer/dashboard/reports/invoices, runs Build→QA loop (evaluator grades backend quality + visual quality), generates landing.html, 3 LinkedIn posts, AUTO-SUMMARY.md. No questions asked after Phase 0.

assertions.text: PLAN.md exists with at least 8 sections including Visual Design Language
SPRINT-CONTRACT.md exists with 20+ testable behaviors (User can...)
brand.md exists with 10+ hex colors and archetype
App builds without errors (npm run build passes)
EVAL-REPORT.md exists with Backend Quality scores (5 sub-criteria)
EVAL-REPORT.md includes Visual Quality Gate (Dribbble test, Framework test)
landing.html exists as self-contained HTML file
3 LinkedIn post files exist in content/posts/
AUTO-SUMMARY.md exists listing all deliverables
No console.log in production source code
Input validation (Zod) on API endpoints
Tests exist and pass for business logic
Zero questions asked to user after initial spec

evals.name: collab-existing-project
evals.prompt: Radim na postojećem Next.js projektu koji ima basic CRUD za korisnike. Treba mi nova feature: notification system — kad admin kreira novog korisnika ili menja status, svi ulogovani korisnici dobijaju real-time notifikaciju. Koristim Server-Sent Events. Hajde zajedno da odradimo. /hp-go
evals.expected_output: Pipeline runs in collab mode: scans existing codebase first (CODEBASE-CONTEXT.md), generates plan respecting existing patterns, creates feature branch (hp/notifications), presents plan at Decision Point 1, builds backend with SSE, presents design at Decision Point 2 (AFTER backend), runs evaluator at Decision Point 3, existing tests still pass (regression check), merge on accept.

assertions.text: CODEBASE-CONTEXT.md generated with detected tech stack
PLAN.md respects existing project patterns (mentions existing files)
Feature branch created before building
Existing tests pass before AND after changes
3 decision points presented to user (plan, design, eval)
Design review happens AFTER backend build, BEFORE frontend
SPRINT-CONTRACT.md has testable behaviors for SSE notifications
No new dependencies that conflict with existing stack

evals.name: hackathon-mode
evals.prompt: Hakaton u Novom Sadu, tema je AI x Education, 24 sata imam, solo sam. Imam laptop sa Claude Code, Node, Python. Nemam Stitch MCP. Pomozi mi da pripremim sve i da pobedim. /hp-hackathon
evals.expected_output: Pipeline activates hackathon mode: generates 8-phase timeline with time budgets, verifies tools (Playwright, chatgpt-py, imperium-crawl), generates HACKATHON-CLAUDE.md for context reload, brainstorm framework with AI x Education ideas, Phase 0 checklist. Loads hackathon rules (demo-first, brainstorm cap 2.5h, 45-min rule).

assertions.text: 8-phase timeline with time budgets generated
HACKATHON-CLAUDE.md template created
Tool verification section present (what's available, what's not)
Brainstorm framework with AI x Education ideas
Hackathon rules referenced (demo-first, brainstorm cap, 45-min rule)
Design fallback mentioned (no Stitch → DESIGN-SPEC.md)

evals.name: deploy-flow
evals.prompt: Imam gotovu Next.js aplikaciju u ovom folderu, build prolazi, testovi prolaze. Deployuj na Vercel, sve mora da radi u produkciji. /hp-deploy
evals.expected_output: Pipeline runs deploy: pre-flight checks (npm run build, npm test, no secrets in code), detects Vercel (Next.js project), runs vercel --prod, verifies production URL responds with 200, writes DEPLOY-LOG.md with URL + timestamp + git hash.

assertions.text: Pre-flight build check executed
Pre-flight test check executed
Secrets check (no hardcoded keys)
Platform auto-detected as Vercel
DEPLOY-LOG.md created with production URL
Production URL verified (curl returns 200)

evals.name: fix-bug
evals.prompt: Imam bug — kad kliknem na 'Delete' dugme na product stranici, ništa se ne dešava. U konzoli vidim error 'TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined'. Pronađi bug, napiši test koji ga reprodukuje, popravi ga i proveri da ništa drugo nije puklo. /hp-fix
evals.expected_output: Pipeline runs fix flow: reproduces bug (navigates to product page, clicks delete), traces root cause via stack trace + grep + git blame, writes FAILING test that reproduces the bug, fixes minimal code to make test pass, runs ALL tests to verify no regression, commits with fix: message and root cause description.

assertions.text: Bug reproduction attempted (Playwright or manual)
Root cause identified with file:line reference
Failing test written that catches the bug
Fix is minimal (not a refactor)
All tests pass after fix (not just the new one)
Commit message includes root cause and fix description

evals.name: backend-quality-eval
evals.prompt: Imam REST API sa 8 endpoint-a (users CRUD, products CRUD). Testiraj kvalitet backend-a — API design, test coverage, security, performance, architecture. Daj mi detaljan eval report sa skorom. /hp-eval
evals.expected_output: Evaluator runs 4-phase evaluation with focus on Backend Quality (5 sub-criteria x 2 points = 10). Reports: API Design (RESTful? validation? error format?), Test Coverage (unit? integration? edge cases?), Security (no secrets? sanitization? auth?), Performance (indexed? N+1? pagination?), Architecture (separation? error middleware?). Uses few-shot calibration to score accurately. Hard fails if no tests or secrets in code.

assertions.text: EVAL-REPORT.md has Backend Quality section with 5 sub-criteria
Each sub-criterion scored X/2 with specific details
Specific file:line references for issues found
Hard fail check includes 'no tests' and 'secrets in code'
Score calibration matches few-shot examples (not inflated)
